title: Teeth of the Hunt
description: Mara hunts rogue shifters for the people who pay best, and she's good — good enough that the Vanmoor pack has put a contract on the hunter who's been thinning their borders. The alpha they send to end her is the last man she expects to recognize. Ten years ago he was the boy who taught her to shoot. Now one of them has to walk away from this clearing, and the bond neither of them outran is making that very hard.
